publications.title: Evolutionary Strategies lead to Catastrophic Forgetting in LLMs
publications.authors: Immanuel Abdi, Akshat Gupta, Micah Mok, Alexander Lu, Nicholas Lee, Gopala Anumanchipalli
publications.description: Demonstrates that gradient-free methods like Evolutionary Strategies induce catastrophic forgetting when fine-tuning LLMs compared to GRPO, driven by denser weight updates and higher ℓ₂ gradient norms.
